name: POND TECHS HLDGS
summary: Pond Technologies Holdings Inc., a technology company, produces microalgal biomass using available sources of carbon dioxide(CO2), including CO2 rich emission sources from industrial plants and the licensing of its technology. The resultant algae is used in the supply of nutraceuticals, superfoods, and aquaculture and animal feeds, as well as feedstock in the production of biofoams and algae based biomaterials, and other algae derived product markets. It also focuses on the terrestrial plant and cannabis industry. The company is headquartered in Markham, Canada.
